Package de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava

Class SchemaJavaParser

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava.SchemaJavaParser
All Implemented Interfaces:
SchemaJavaParserConstants
public class SchemaJavaParser extends Object implements SchemaJavaParserConstants
JavaCC AST generation specification based on the original Java1.1 grammar that comes with javacc, and includes the modification of D. Williams to accept the Java 1.2 strictfp modifier. Several patches have been added to allow semicola after member declarations. Augmented with meta constructs and schema variables for use of a schematic Java in Taclets.
